scripts.build: rm -rf build && xcodebuild -project OctopusSync.xcodeproj -scheme OctopusSync -configuration Release CONFIGURATION_BUILD_DIR=$PWD/build
scripts.dmg: rm -rf build/dmg && mkdir -p build/dmg && cp -R build/OctopusSync.app build/dmg && ln -s /Applications build/dmg/Applications && hdiutil create -volname "OctopusSync" -srcfolder build/dmg -ov -format UDZO build/OctopusSync.dmg && rm -rf build/dmg
scripts.dist: pnpm run build && pnpm run dmg
